title: Jonas Vingegaard Just Became So Clearly the Favorite for the Giro It’s Painful
content:
UPDATED: Carapaz latest to pull out as decimation of the startlist due to injury and illness clears Vingegaard's path to debut victory.

Read the full article at Jonas Vingegaard Just Became So Clearly the Favorite for the Giro It’s Painful on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
